There is no commission, revenue share or: There is no commission, revenue share or withdrawal. Users pay directly into your own payment account. When you generate redemption codes or a payment is processed, the platform deducts the cost from your wholesale wallet at your discount — the difference between the retail price you set and your wholesale cost is entirely yours.
